No separate Khor Fakkan bunker register found. Anchorage bunkering typically served by Port of Fujairah-licensed suppliers (see AEFJR hub). Avoid duplicating Fujairah rows until port publishes Khor Fakkan-specific list.

hubs.license_authority: Ministry of Environment and Energy (YPEN) — B1 tax-free marine fuels register
hubs.ingest_notes: Official B1 wholesale marine fuels register exists on ypen.gov.gr but PDF downloads return HTTP 403 from automated fetch (Dec 2023–2025 URLs tested). Piraeus Port Authority (OLP) publishes no separate bunker supplier roster. Retry with manual download or EMSA DONA Greece profile.

Turkish bunker suppliers hold EPDK ihrakiye teslimi (bunker delivery) licences queryable via EPVYS portal only — no bulk downloadable official list without interactive session. Resmi Gazete grants individual decisions, not a maintained hub roster.
